content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 55 lbs **가치:** 10 GP --- 탐험가의 꾸러미에는 다음 물품들이 포함됩니다: [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [침낭](/212f7f5a1e80811b9a62d2dc4dadb75f?pvs=25), [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25) 2병, 10일분의 [휴대식량](/212f7f5a1e808112b5ecfacc3de52b5a?pvs=25), [밧줄](/212f7f5a1e8081209061f85619dae8f0?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25), [횃불](/212f7f5a1e8081b68747cc7dd4de95ae?pvs=25) 10개, [가죽물통](/212f7f5a1e80815da95ac2b204f7677f?pvs=25).
